title: DARDEN RESTAURANTS TO HOST FISCAL 2024 FIRST QUARTER CONFERENCE CALL ON SEPTEMBER 21
text: ORLANDO, Fla. , Aug. 24, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Darden Restaurants, Inc., (NYSE:DRI) plans to release its fiscal 2024 first quarter financial results before the market opens on Thursday, September 21, 2023, with a conference call to follow at 8:30 am ET.

title: After Plunging -7.04% in 4 Weeks, Here's Why the Trend Might Reverse for Darden Restaurants (DRI)
text: Darden Restaurants (DRI) has become technically an oversold stock now, which implies exhaustion of the heavy selling pressure on it. This, combined with strong agreement among Wall Street analysts in revising earnings estimates higher, indicates a potential trend reversal for the stock in the near term.
